description: Create Home page React component with welcome message

userStories.title: Create Home.jsx component file
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Home page component with centered welcome content.
acceptanceCriteria: Component is a functional React component named 'Home'
Returns a div with inline styles: textAlign: 'center', padding: '20px'
Contains h1 element with text 'Welcome to the Home Page'
Contains p element with text 'This is the body content with dummy data for the new Home page.'
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Component created and verified through build and lint checks
